Track all notable changes, new features,: Track all notable changes, new features, and bug fixes in MBC CQRS Serverless Web packages.
All notable changes to the Web packages: All notable changes to the Web packages (`@mbc-cqrs-serverless/master-web`, `@mbc-cqrs-serverless/survey-web`) are documented here.
Fix JSON Bulk Import 404 error by correc: Fix JSON Bulk Import 404 error by correcting `MASTER.BULK` API path
`API_URLS.MASTER.BULK` was pointing to `: `API_URLS.MASTER.BULK` was pointing to `/master-bulk/bulk` but the backend `MasterBulkController` uses `@Post('/')`, so corrected to `/master-bulk`
Fix runtime crash when `attributes.field: Fix runtime crash when `attributes.fields` is undefined
Added optional chaining (`?.`) to all `a: Added optional chaining (`?.`) to all `attributes.fields` accesses across EditMasterData, MasterData, NewCopy, and schema modules
Fix `useEffect` infinite loop in Setting: Fix `useEffect` infinite loop in SettingsForm, CopyData, and DetailCopy
Removed unstable dependencies from `useE: Removed unstable dependencies from `useEffect` dependency arrays to prevent infinite re-renders
Used `useRef` for `savedResults` to prev: Used `useRef` for `savedResults` to prevent stale closure race conditions
Add try-catch for `JSON.parse` in all Ad: Add try-catch for `JSON.parse` in all AddJsonData components
Previously, invalid JSON input caused an: Previously, invalid JSON input caused an unhandled crash; now shows a user-friendly error toast
Improve bulk import response handling wh: Improve bulk import response handling when no items have changes
When all submitted items are unchanged (: When all submitted items are unchanged (no `requestId`), the dialog now closes with a "no changes" message instead of showing an error
Added error toast on API failure: Added error toast on API failure
Fix `BaseUrlProvider` generating incorre: Fix `BaseUrlProvider` generating incorrect URLs with empty segment
Empty segment produced a leading `/` cau: Empty segment produced a leading `/` causing double-slash URLs

Added 30+ test files covering validation: Added 30+ test files covering validation functions, date utilities, form helpers, pagination, exceptions, URL provider, schemas, and component rendering

Replace legacy deploy workflow with tag-: Replace legacy deploy workflow with tag-based CI/CD pipeline

Add README.md with Quick Start guide, co: Add README.md with Quick Start guide, component reference, and usage examples
Externalize React/Next.js peer dependenc: Externalize React/Next.js peer dependencies to resolve Context isolation issue
React, React DOM, and Next.js are now li: React, React DOM, and Next.js are now listed as `peerDependencies` instead of bundled dependencies
This ensures the host application's Reac: This ensures the host application's React instance is shared, preventing duplicate React contexts
Resolves `httpClient.get is not a functi: Resolves `httpClient.get is not a function` errors caused by context isolation in npm packages
